_meta.provenance: Proposed role-based access model. This is platform design awaiting government confirmation — no production authentication exists. Any prototype login is clearly labeled and is NOT production-ready security.
principles: Least privilege: every role sees the minimum needed for its function.
Scoped by geography and module: a district officer never sees another district's cases.
Every view of personal data is audit-logged; every approval leaves a trail.
Minors' data (screening, safeguarding) has sealed tracks with role + purpose checks.
Public users see only what publication policy explicitly opens (per A-M1-2 and Q10).

roles.name: Platform administrator
roles.view: System configuration, registries, audit logs (not sealed safeguarding content)
roles.approve: None (technical role, not a decision authority)
roles.audit: All actions logged; dual-control for role grants

roles.name: Central-government administrator (MYAS/SAI)
roles.view: All national dashboards, registers, approval queues
roles.approve: Central-level approvals, scheme decisions, publication changes
roles.audit: Approvals and exports logged with order references

roles.name: State-government administrator
roles.view: State dashboards, state subtree of every registry
roles.create: State schemes, state records, resolver assignments

roles.name: District administrator / DSO
roles.view: District queues, facility and athlete records in jurisdiction
roles.audit: Verification decisions logged with evidence references

roles.name: Federation administrator (NSF/state unit)
roles.view: Own federation's registry entries, filings, compliance scorecard
roles.create: Compliance filings, event sanctions, result submissions

roles.name: Data steward
roles.view: Data-quality queues, dedupe candidates, catalogue metadata

roles.name: Approver
roles.view: Approval queues with full case files
roles.audit: Decisions logged with delegation reference — the accountability core

roles.name: Researcher (approved)
roles.view: Anonymised/aggregate datasets per M20 partnership terms
roles.audit: Every extract logged against the data-sharing agreement

roles.name: Public user / athlete
roles.view: Public pages; own profile and applications (authenticated)
roles.audit: Consent changes and data exports logged
